Baton is a marketplace for small business sellers and buyers. 

Baton supports any small business by getting them to a successful sale on the first trusted and transparent platform in the industry. We empower owners with the right information upfront and then match them to serious buyers who see verified company data on our platform.

Company Short Description:
Acclaro is derived from the Latin verb "acclaro," which means to reveal or, more specifically, to clarify, reveal, amplify and decide -- an ideal name for our consulting firm. 

Our mission is to facilitate enhanced decision-making to maximize growth, reduce risk and create value for investors, their management teams, and our corporate clients.

Acclaro's mission is to help our middle market clients in the M&A ecosystem focus on the right companies (with eyes wide open to the opportunities and the risks); and help management teams focus on the best options for growth, post-close. 

We ensure our loyal cadre of clients has the highest ROIs in the industry, by consistently generating actionable insights to support their investment decisions. We are focused on outcomes, by linking research and analysis to solutions. 

Our role is to serve as more than just data gatherers – we deliver options, ideas, and actionable insights to directly address your decision points.

We work together, as if we are partners down the hall. We communicate frequently. If there is bad news, it travels fast. We are an extension of your team.

Our focus is on middle-market companies in the industrial services and products, commercial products and services, consumer products and services, technology, healthcare, and energy and utilities sectors.

Title: Co-founder
Company Short Description:
Baton is a marketplace for small business sellers and buyers. 

Baton supports any small business by getting them to a successful sale on the first trusted and transparent platform in the industry. We empower owners with the right information upfront and then match them to serious buyers who see verified company data on our platform.

Managing a small business is complicated. Even though small businesses make up more than half of the US economy, it's hard to get reliable data. How can anyone be expected to sell their small business if there's no standard for figuring out what a small business is worth?

We built Baton to unlock small business data for everyone. Owners use our platform to instantly get a more accurate valuation using public data and their own financials. 

We believe every small business owner deserves the support they need to take their next step. That journey starts with Baton.

Baton is backed by Giant Ventures, Bloomberg Beta, and a syndicate of world-class angel investors.

Title: President & Founder
Company Short Description:
Helping High-Level Corporate Executives Transition to Purposeful Entrepreneurship Without Sacrificing Income or Security.

I wish I had the benefit of guidance, mentorship, and support before jumping into entrepreneurship 20 years ago at the age of 49. My burning desire to be an entrepreneur was deeply buried. It found satisfaction in gravitating towards jobs that challenged me with NEW projects, TURNAROUNDS, and BUILDING businesses for my employers FROM SCRATCH.

My last job was at Morgan Stanley, where I was a Managing Director for 18 years. Each of the last two years, I handed in my resignation, only to be persuaded to stay. Perhaps it was the lack of clarity about my business idea, the fear of starting from scratch without the backing of a big brand, or concerns about maintaining our family's lifestyle and income.

The words of our CEO at a quarterly MD meeting echoed in my mind: "We pay you enough so you won't quit." These words, though said in a different context, became embedded in my brain, highlighting the golden handcuffs of the corporate world.

It took a life-altering experience—being swept away by the tsunami in December 2004 while on vacation with my family—to stir me into action. We survived, and shortly after returning to New York, I resigned.

That was nearly 20 years ago. Did I have a clear plan to launch? I thought so; otherwise, I wouldn't have started my business within 4 months of quitting, with 10 employees overseas in India. What was I thinking?

The story goes on: I have since had five start-ups and some incredible experiences that would have never happened in the shade of my big job at the big firm.

LIVE, don't die with your gifts. If not now, when?

Hedman Partners, LLP is a full-service Certified Public Accounting (CPA) firm dedicated to helping "middle-market" businesses and high-net-worth individuals navigate today's complex financial landscape. Our clients, typically businesses with revenues between $10M and $100M, operate across multi-state and international markets.

Our team of seasoned professionals provides a comprehensive suite of services, including tax, audit, estate and succession planning, M&A advisory, consulting, and more. But we don't stop there. We go beyond traditional accounting by becoming true trusted advisors, helping clients not only understand their financial position but also envision and achieve their long-term goals.

Why Choose Us?
We combine technical expertise with personal attention to deliver exceptional value. At Hedman Partners, our mission is to empower our clients by providing clear guidance and actionable insights tailored to their unique needs and dreams. We pride ourselves on building meaningful, long-term client relationships founded on trust, transparency, and results.

Who We Serve
We specialize in serving a range of industries, including:

Manufacturing
Distribution
Real Estate
Software
Beauty
Service Industries
Whether it's navigating multi-state complexities, scaling internationally, or planning for the future, our clients rely on us to guide them every step of the way.

What Sets Us Apart
We are more than accountants—we are partners in your success. Through our firm and our affiliates, Hedman M&A Advisors and Raleigh Hedman Financial Services, we offer a breadth of solutions to help businesses and individuals alike grow, protect, and secure their financial futures.

If you're ready to move beyond the numbers and work with advisors who truly care about your success, let's connect. Visit us at www.hedmanpartners.com to learn more.

Title: CEO & Chief Investment Officer
Company Short Description:
In October 2020, Encina Capital Partners, LLC and an affiliate of certain funds managed by Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. together announced the launch of Encina Lender Finance, LLC ("ELF"), a new independent lender finance platform targeting consumer and commercial specialty finance companies in the U.S. and Canada.

Operating from both coasts, ELF offers delayed draw term loans and forward flow purchase programs ranging in size from $50 - $150 million to emerging and established specialty finance companies with strong junior capital sponsorship. ELF targets ABF investments in granular pools of short-to-intermediate duration asset classes in the consumer and commercial finance sectors. Targeted consumer asset classes include unsecured installment and revolving loans (direct-to-consumer and POS), secured vehicle finance, home improvement loans, rent-to-own / lease-to-own, debt consolidation loans, and student lending (in-school vocational, refi). Targeted commercial asset classes include small balance SMB lending (both direct-to-business and embedded POS), MCA, small-ticket equipment finance, corporate charge card, earned wage access, and supply chain / trade finance. In addition, ELF provides streamlined "first out" financing to other like-minded private credit investors in the specialty finance sector. ELF utilizes a combination of cutting-edge technologies and rigorous collateral-level analysis to generate differentiated investment insights and creative solutions to its counterparties' credit portfolio financing needs.

In October 2020, Encina Capital Partners, LLC and an affiliate of certain funds managed by Oaktree Capital Management, L.P. together announced the launch of Encina Lender Finance, LLC ("ELF"), a new independent lender finance platform targeting consumer and commercial specialty finance companies in the U.S. and Canada.

In addition, ELF provides streamlined "first out" financing to other like-minded private credit investors in the specialty finance sector. ELF utilizes a combination of cutting-edge technologies and rigorous collateral-level analysis to generate differentiated investment insights and creative solutions to its counterparties' credit portfolio financing needs.

Title: Founder & Principal
Company Short Description:
Large Practice Sales (LPS) has completed over $1.0 billion of IDSO (Invisible Dental Support Organization) partnerships in the last 24 months for GPs and all specialists. Doctors sell 51% to 80% of their practice for cash at today's low tax rates and continue to lead their practice as owners with full autonomy for years or decades. Contact us today to schedule an introductory call with Co-Founder, Chip Fichtner.

HOW IT WORKS
LPS enables dentists of all specialties to monetize a part of their practice value with a silent partner for cash at today's low tax rates. Doctors continue as owners leading their practice under the doctor's brand, team and strategy for years or decades. Doctors gain the resources of a larger partner to grow faster and more profitably and increase the value of their retained ownership.

IDSOs by design act as silent partners with owner doctors. They don't micromanage nor homogenize practices to a corporate standard. All of their partner practices are different, even in the same communities and specialties. Their goal is to partner with great practices, not to change them.
 
Our team handles every step—from valuation to negotiations—so you can focus on what matters most: patient care and growing your practice.

WHY Choose LPS vs. "Do it Yourself" or one of the Small Advisors?
• Maximized Value: Choose from multiple offers from qualified, compatible IDSO bidders.
• Tailored Solutions: Every IDSO partnership is structured to meet the goals of the client doctors including initial value, future equity upside and tax considerations.
• End-to-End Support: From initial practice valuation to closing, the LPS team handles all aspects of your IDSO partnership.
• Industry Expertise: Over almost a decade of executing IDSO partnerships for hundreds of clients, LPS has knowledge of which are the qualified bidders with long term equity value.
• We Earn Our Fee: Unlike others, LPS isn't paid by the IDSOs and are paid nothing unless a partnership is completed.

Valiant Capital is a leading capital advisory and lending firm, empowering businesses nationwide with a strategic focus on the vibrant Texas market. Our mission is to deliver bespoke capital solutions that propel our clients to unparalleled success.
